message:
Align README with tenzir/tenzir structure

- Center header with consistent tagline and subtitle
- Add NOTE callout explaining this is the Platform repo
- Lead Get Started with cloud-hosted option, then Sovereign Edition
- Fix mailto link syntax

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -1,41 +1,46 @@ - -

+

+ + - + -

 -

-The data pipeline engine for security teams. -

-

+

Data Pipelines for Security Teams

+ +

Collect, transform, enrich, and route your telemetry—all in one place.

+ +
+ +> [!NOTE] +> This repository hosts the **Tenzir Platform**—the control plane for managing +> your Tenzir nodes and workspaces. Looking for the data pipeline engine +> itself? Head over to [tenzir/tenzir](https://github.com/tenzir/tenzir). ## What is Tenzir? +Tenzir is the data pipeline engine for security teams. + If you need to collect, parse, shape, normalize, aggregate, store, query, and route security telemetry data at scale, you'll love how our pipelines manage your dataflows. Tenzir makes it easy to quickly onboard and store data from numerous sources, reduce data volumes to optimize cloud and data costs, and execute detections and run analytics in-stream. -## Get started +## Get Started -This repository hosts the on-premise version of the Tenzir Platform and a -command-line utility for managing workspaces and nodes on the Tenzir Platform. +Visit [app.tenzir.com][app] to enjoy the free, cloud-hosted version of the +Tenzir Platform. If you are a customer of the **Sovereign Edition**, deploy the Tenzir Platform -locally by following our [Deploy the platform][guide] setup guide step by step. - -> [!NOTE] -> To get more information about the **Sovereign Edition**, please [contact -> sales](mailto://sales@tenzir.com). Visit [app.tenzir.com][app] to enjoy the -> free, cloud-hosted version of the Tenzir Platform. +on-premise by following our [platform setup guide][guide] step by step. To learn +more about the Sovereign Edition, please [contact sales][sales]. [app]: https://app.tenzir.com [guide]: https://docs.tenzir.com/guides/platform-setup/ +[sales]: mailto:sales@tenzir.com ## Community
